project_type: Turborepo monorepo. apps/mobile-staff = Expo/React Native (Expo Router, NativeWind) staff operations app. apps/web = Next.js 15 App Router grocery site (shadcn/ui, Tailwind, Prisma, NextAuth v5, next-intl, next-themes, framer-motion).
language: TypeScript (React 19 pinned to 19.1.0 via root overrides)
build_system: npm workspaces + turbo 2.5. Root scripts: build:web -> turbo build --filter=@msm/web; dev:staff -> turbo dev --filter=@msm/mobile-staff. Install once at repo root with npm install.
test_framework: web: `npm test` runs tsx --test on tests/*.test.ts (node test runner); Playwright e2e via `npm run test:ui` (needs browsers + running server, not feasible in sandbox). staff: no unit test framework configured (eslint + tsc only).
build_command: Web: from apps/web run `npx tsc --noEmit` (primary typecheck) and `npm run lint`. Full `npm run build:web` requires placeholder env vars because scripts/verify-production-env.mjs (web prebuild) fails when NODE_ENV=production and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL / UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN are unset; set dummy values plus a DATABASE_URL to attempt it. Staff: no host/native build in sandbox (uses EAS); verify with `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run lint` from apps/mobile-staff.
test_command: Web: `npm test` (from apps/web). Staff: none; rely on tsc + eslint.
verification_instructions: 1) Root: npm install. 2) Staff (apps/mobile-staff): npx tsc --noEmit ; npm run lint. 3) Web (apps/web): npx tsc --noEmit ; npm run lint ; npm test. 4) Optionally attempt `npm run build:web` from repo root with env: UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL=https://example.com UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN=dummy DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/db ; document if it fails for reasons unrelated to the changes.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma generate runs during web build (prisma/schema.prisma -> @prisma/client). No visual snapshot fixtures checked in for these areas. Lighthouse config (lighthouserc.cjs) exists but requires a running server.
setup_instructions: Network registry is reachable (npm ping OK), so `npm install` at repo root works. React is pinned to 19.1.0 via root package.json overrides; do not bump. Do NOT modify prisma schema or add native modules to the staff app.
environment_constraints: Network reachable to npm registry (package installs OK). No Android/iOS simulator or EAS build in sandbox: staff app cannot be run on a device here, so verification is static (tsc + eslint). Staff app depends on native modules (@react-native-firebase, @notifee/react-native, @maplibre/maplibre-react-native) so `expo export --platform web` is unreliable and should not be treated as a gate. Web full `next build` needs placeholder env vars (see build_command).
contribution_requirements: Keep changes scoped to UI/animation (staff) and UI/UX + dark-theme (web). Do not touch Prisma schema, auth flow logic, or API route behavior. Respect prefers-reduced-motion (globals.css already zeroes animation durations under it; framer-motion MotionConfig reducedMotion="user"; staff Reanimated code should degrade gracefully). React 19.1.0 and existing library versions are fixed.
key_patterns: STAFF: NativeWind className styling; existing shared primitives in src/components (Button, ScreenHeader, Typography, SlideToConfirm, AnimatedFadeIn, ui/Shimmer, ui/ErrorState). Reanimated 4.1 + react-native-gesture-handler 2.28 + react-native-worklets 0.5 are installed. Tailwind primary palette = emerald (primary-500 #10b981). expo-router file-based routing with route groups (auth)/(admin)/(packing)/(delivery); tab layouts use emoji icons. WEB: shadcn 'new-york' style, CSS variables in app/globals.css (:root + .dark), tokens (bg-background/foreground/card/muted/border via hsl(var(--x))), plus a large hand-written animation/utility CSS layer. Dark mode = class strategy via next-themes ThemeProvider (attribute='class', defaultTheme='light', enableSystem=false).
relevant_files: apps/mobile-staff/app/_layout.tsx (root: MISSING GestureHandlerRootView wrapper though SlideToConfirm uses GestureDetector; add it; set Stack screen animations)
apps/mobile-staff/app/(admin)/_layout.tsx, app/(delivery)/_layout.tsx, app/(packing)/_layout.tsx (plain tab bars, emoji icons, no animated indicator/press)
apps/mobile-staff/src/components/AnimatedFadeIn.tsx (exists, barely used), src/components/ui/Shimmer.tsx (opacity-only, static #e2e8f0, no dark)

apps/mobile-staff/app/(admin)/index.tsx|orders.tsx|reports.tsx|settings.tsx, app/(delivery)/index.tsx + order/[id]/*, app/(packing)/index.tsx|order/[id].tsx|profile.tsx, app/dashboard/index.tsx, app/(auth)/login.tsx|otp.tsx, app/alert/*, app/orders/[id]/*
apps/mobile-staff/app/(delivery)/order/[id]/index.tsx and app/(admin)/settings.tsx (hardcode bg-white/text-slate-* with NO dark: variants: dark-mode broken there)
apps/web/components/providers.tsx (ThemeProvider enableSystem=false but Settings offers a 'System' option => broken)
apps/web/components/account/settings-client.tsx (renders System theme option calling setTheme('system'); SettingToggle knob uses bg-white which the global override breaks in dark)
apps/web/app/globals.css (aggressive `.dark .bg-white{...}` etc global overrides; `::selection` has no dark variant; large hand-written animation layer)

apps/web/components/theme-toggle.tsx + components/ui/theme-toggle.tsx + components/ui/theme-toggle-inline.tsx (THREE duplicate toggles, inconsistent theme vs resolvedTheme, placeholder not dark-aware)
apps/web/components/header.tsx (desktop+mobile back-nav for a hardcoded innerPages list; /offers not covered; uses router.push(parentPath) not router.back())

apps/web/app/dashboard/page.tsx, components/home/home-hero.tsx and the grep list of bg-white-without-dark files (admin/collections-client, admin/customer-requests-client, admin/new-order-alert, language-switcher, web-onboarding, admin/dispatch/page, admin/orders/[id], global-error)
directory_structure: apps/mobile-staff: app/ (expo-router routes + route groups (auth)/(admin)/(packing)/(delivery), alert/, orders/, dashboard/), src/components (shared UI + ui/ subfolder), src/services, src/stores, src/config; config: app.json, eas.json, babel.config.js, metro.config.js, tailwind.config.js, global.css. apps/web: app/ (App Router pages + api/), components/ (ui/, admin/, account/, cart/, home/, etc.), lib/, prisma/, i18n/, tests/, playwright.config.ts, tailwind.config.ts, app/globals.css. packages/shared shared types.
